item.title: OpenAI Hit with Lawsuits Over Teen Suicides: 4 Pivots Shaping Safer Consumer AI
item.description: With lawsuits piling up against OpenAI over chatbots linked to teen suicides, it's time to look at how the industry is pivoting toward safer AI. From Walmart's clever integrations to biotech startups fighting diseases and climate change, here's the real story on balancing innovation with responsibility—plus what it means for all of us.
